name: Rice and Radicchio Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium soup pot, heat the olive oil until very hot.
2. Add the onions and cook, stirring constantly for 4 minutes.
3. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the chicken stock and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Add the cooked rice and simmer for an additional 3 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Remove from heat.
9. To serve, place 1/4 cup radicchio, 1 tablespoon prosciutto, 1/2 teaspoon sage, and 1 tablespoon Parmesan cheese in each soup bowl.
10. Ladle the hot soup over the garnishes.
Yield: 6 servings
